notes: HEADLESS script: no ScriptUI panel — screenshot and uiTreePath are null.

Expressions using try { ... } blocks (Rect Size, Rect Position) were evaluated analytically: the evaluator cannot return the last value of a try statement. Curves show the expected constant output from the Void pseudo-effect (Width=200, OffsetX=0).

Expressions using AE spatial transforms (toComp, fromComp) and createPath were sampled with identity approximations (toComp/fromComp = identity). The shape-path endpoint x-coordinate is used as the scalar proxy for the path value.
content("Repeater 1").copies is injected as a global in the evaluator context for the Repeater Rotation expressions (360/copies).
Passthrough expressions (Stroke 1/2 Width, Dash 1/2, Gap 1/2, Color, Density) confirm linear 1:1 relationship between StrokeBurst effect parameter and layer property.
Stroke 2 Transform/Rotation shows Stroke1.rotation (22.5°) + RotationOffset (0→360°) = additive linear sweep from 22.5° to 382.5°.
